bali.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
activities: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport in Bali.
Meet with your wedding planner and venue coordinator to go over final details.
Check-in at your chosen accommodation, whether it's a luxury resort or a private villa.
Relax and freshen up after your journey.
Welcome dinner at a beachfront restaurant with traditional Balinese cuisine.
Guests can mingle and get to know each other in a relaxed atmosphere.

bali.title: Wedding Day
activities: Breakfast at the hotel or villa.
Bridal party and groomsmen preparations. Hair and makeup for the bride and bridesmaids.
Wedding ceremony at a beautiful beachfront venue or a lush garden setting.
Cocktail hour with canapés and drinks, followed by a professional photography session.
Reception dinner with live music or a DJ.
First dance, speeches, and cutting of the wedding cake. Dancing and celebration with family and friends.

bali.title: Relaxation and Exploration
activities: Late breakfast or brunch at the hotel or villa.
Relax by the pool or on the beach. Spa treatments or massages for the couple and guests.
Optional group excursion for guests, such as a visit to a nearby temple, a cultural show, or a water sports activity.
Sunset cocktails and dinner at a cliffside restaurant with stunning views.
Private fire dance performance or other cultural entertainment.

bali.title: Farewell Brunch and Departure
activities: Farewell brunch at the accommodation or a nearby restaurant.
Thank your guests for joining you on this special journey.
Guests can relax by the pool, enjoy the beach, or do some last-minute souvenir shopping.
Check-out from the hotel or villa.
Depart for Ngurah Rai International Airport for your onward journey or honeymoon.

dubai.title: Arrival in Dubai
activities: Arrive at Dubai International Airport and transfer to your chosen hotel or resort.
Check-in and freshen up.
Welcome lunch or afternoon tea at the hotel. Relax and unwind by the pool or beach.
Spa treatments for the bridal party (optional).
Welcome dinner at a fine-dining restaurant or a private reception at the hotel.
Toast to the beginning of your wedding festivities.

dubai.title: Pre-Wedding Activities
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Bride and groom preparations for the big day. Bridal party's hair and makeup appointments.
Wedding ceremony rehearsal.
Explore Dubai for last-minute shopping or sightseeing.
Rehearsal dinner or a casual gathering with friends and family. Enjoy a laid-back evening.

dubai.title: Wedding Day
activities: Start the day with a leisurely breakfast.
Hair and makeup sessions for the bride and bridesmaids. Groom and groomsmen get ready.
Exchange vows at your chosen wedding venue. Popular options include beachfront settings, desert oases, or luxury resorts.
Post-ceremony cocktail hour with canapés. Group photos and couple's photoshoot.
Grand wedding reception with dinner and entertainment. Cutting the cake, speeches, and dancing.
Fireworks or a light show to cap off the evening.

dubai.title: Post-Wedding Celebrations and Farewell
activities: Late breakfast or brunch with your guests. Share memories and stories from the wedding day.
Optional activities for guests, such as a desert safari, city tour, or spa day.
Relax by the hotel's pool or beach.
Farewell dinner or cocktail reception. Thank your guests for joining you on this special journey.

dubai.title: Departure
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Check-out and arrange airport transfers.
Bid farewell to Dubai and your guests.

georgia.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
activities: Morning:
Arrive at your chosen airport in Georgia (e.g., Atlanta Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport).
Transfer to your accommodation, which could be a charming inn, a luxury hotel, or a rental property, depending on your preferences and budget.
Afternoon:
Check-in and freshen up.
Explore the local area or relax by the hotel pool.
Evening:
Welcome dinner for your guests at a local restaurant or a private event space.
Toast to the beginning of your wedding celebrations.

georgia.title: Wedding Ceremony
activities: Morning:
Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at your accommodation.
If you're getting ready at a different location, make arrangements for hair and makeup.
Afternoon:
Wedding ceremony at your chosen venue, whether it's a vineyard, historic estate, beach, or any other scenic spot.
Cocktail hour and group photos following the ceremony.
Evening:
Reception and dinner with live music or DJ entertainment.
Dancing and celebrating with family and friends.

georgia.title: Exploring Georgia
activities: Morning:
Brunch with close family and friends at the accommodation or a local restaurant.
Afternoon:
Guided tour or excursion to explore the local attractions, such as visiting nearby wineries, historic sites, or natural parks.
Evening:
Rehearsal dinner at a local restaurant or venue.
Spend quality time with your wedding party and close family members.

georgia.title: Farewell Brunch and Departure
activities: Morning:
Farewell brunch with all your wedding guests.
Thank everyone for joining you in celebrating your special day.
Afternoon:
Check out of your accommodation.
Depending on your flight schedule, you may have some free time for last-minute shopping or relaxation.
Evening:
Depart for the airport for your journey back home or continue your honeymoon in Georgia.

italy.title: Arrival in Italy - Welcome Dinner
activities: Arrive at your chosen Italian destination.
Check into your selected accommodation.
Get settled in and freshen up.
Welcome dinner for all guests at a local Italian restaurant.
Toast to the beginning of your wedding celebration.

italy.title: Pre-Wedding Excursion and Rehearsal Dinner
activities: Breakfast at your accommodation. Relax and prepare for the day ahead.
Guided tour or group excursion to a local attraction (e.g., historical site, winery tour). Alternatively, spend this time with your bridal party.
Lunch on your own or in small groups.
Return to your accommodation to prepare for the evening.
Rehearsal for the wedding ceremony.
Rehearsal dinner at a charming Italian restaurant or a private venue.

italy.title: Wedding Day
activities: Breakfast in your accommodation.
Begin hair and makeup preparations for the bride and bridal party. Groom and groomsmen prepare.
Guests have free time to relax or explore the local area.
Wedding ceremony at your chosen wedding venue.
Cocktail hour with drinks and appetizers.
Reception dinner with dancing and celebrations. Cake cutting and toasts.

italy.title: Post-Wedding Brunch and Farewell
activities: Farewell brunch for all guests at a scenic location or your accommodation.
Optional group activities or free time for guests to explore independently.
Packing and preparations for departure.
Departure for those not staying longer.

mauritius.title: Arrival in Mauritius
activities: Arrive at Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport (MRU).
Meet your wedding planner or coordinator. Transfer to your chosen accommodation (resort, hotel, or villa).
Check-in and freshen up. Explore the resort or relax on the beach.
Welcome dinner or cocktail party at the resort.
Enjoy a beautiful sunset view.

mauritius.title: Wedding Day
activities: Breakfast at the resort. Spa and beauty treatments for the bride and bridesmaids.
Groom and groomsmen preparations.
Wedding ceremony at a scenic beachfront location or garden.
Reception and celebration immediately following the ceremony.
Dinner and dancing under the stars.

mauritius.title: Post-Wedding Activities
activities: Leisurely breakfast.
Optional group activities like snorkeling, scuba diving, or boat trips.
Enjoy some water sports or explore local attractions like Chamarel Seven Colored Earths or the Black River Gorges National Park.
Romantic beachside dinner for the newlyweds.
Bonfire or beach party for all guests.

mauritius.title: Departure
activities: Final breakfast at the resort.
Free time for last-minute shopping or relaxation.
Check out of the resort.
Transfer to the airport for your departure.

phuket.title: Arrival in Phuket
activities: Arrive at Phuket International Airport.
Meet and greet by wedding organizers or hotel staff.
Check-in at your chosen hotel or resort. Spend some relaxing time by the pool or beach.
Welcome dinner or cocktail party at the hotel or a nearby beachfront venue.
Enjoy a Thai cultural performance or fire show.

phuket.title: Wedding Ceremony
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Spa and grooming appointments for the bride and groom.
Pre-wedding photoshoot at a scenic location in Phuket (e.g., a beach, temple, or lush garden).
Wedding ceremony at a picturesque venue (beachfront, garden, or resort).
Reception dinner with a Thai and international menu.
Dancing and entertainment (live band or DJ).

phuket.title: Relaxation and Excursion
activities: Leisurely breakfast.
Relax by the pool or indulge in spa treatments.
Group excursion or optional activities for guests (options may include island hopping, snorkeling, or a visit to Phang Nga Bay).
Farewell dinner with traditional Thai cuisine.
Speeches, toasts, and dancing to celebrate the wedding.

phuket.title: Departure
activities: Breakfast and check-out from the hotel.
Transfer to Phuket International Airport.
Departure for your home country.

srilanka.title: Arrival and Welcome Dinner
activities: Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport in Colombo.
Transfer to your chosen wedding venue or hotel in Negombo or Colombo.
Check-in and freshen up. Relax and unwind by the pool or beach.
Optional spa treatments for the bride and groom to relax before the big day.
Wedding party preparations and rehearsals.
Welcome dinner for all guests at the hotel or a nearby restaurant with cultural performances.

srilanka.title: Wedding Day
activities: Breakfast at the hotel. Hair and makeup sessions for the bridal party. Groom and groomsmen get ready.
Wedding preparations and final touches.
Wedding ceremony at a picturesque location, such as a beach, garden, or a historic site.
Exchange vows in a beautiful outdoor setting. Group photos and couple's photoshoot.
Cocktail hour with drinks and canapés.
Sunset reception with a sumptuous dinner, featuring Sri Lankan and international cuisine.
Dancing and entertainment, including a DJ or live band. Cutting the wedding cake and toasts.

srilanka.title: Post-Wedding Celebration
activities: Late breakfast for everyone to recover from the previous night's festivities.
Relax by the pool, beach, or at the spa.
Optional group activities or excursions for guests who want to explore Sri Lanka's culture.
Light lunch for all guests. More relaxation and leisure time.
Farewell dinner with a traditional Sri Lankan BBQ or seafood feast.
Share your gratitude with your guests for being part of your special day.

srilanka.title: Departure
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Check-out and farewells to your guests.
Transfer to the airport for your onward journey or honeymoon.

vietnam.title: Arrival in Vietnam
activities: Arrive at Tan Son Nhat International Airport in Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon).
Transfer to your chosen hotel or resort in the city.
Check-in and freshen up at the hotel.
Spend some leisure time exploring the vibrant streets of Saigon.
Welcome dinner at a local Vietnamese restaurant, where you can enjoy traditional cuisine.

vietnam.title: Wedding Ceremony
activities: Relax and prepare for your wedding ceremony.
Wedding ceremony and reception at your chosen wedding venue. Popular options include beachfront resorts in places like Nha Trang or Da Nang, or a picturesque venue in Hoi An.
Photography session at iconic locations or scenic spots.
Wedding reception with a banquet and dancing under the stars.

vietnam.title: Explore Vietnam
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Depending on your location, consider exploring the local culture and attractions. In Hoi An, ancient town; in Nha Trang, relax on the beach or snorkel; in Da Nang, visit Marble Mountains.
Enjoy a spa day or relaxation at the hotel or resort.
If you're in a coastal location, consider water activities like paddleboarding, jet-skiing, or a boat tour.
Farewell dinner at a rooftop restaurant or a special event at your resort.

vietnam.title: Departure
activities: Check out of your hotel.
Depending on your flight schedule, you may have some free time for last-minute shopping or exploration.
Transfer to the airport for your departure.
